alkylation reagent: by adding 10 µl of 0.33 g/mL iodoacetic acid
alkylation concentration: by adding 10 µl of 0.33 g/mL iodoacetic acid
cleavage agent: 20 µL freshly prepared trypsin solution (0.01 µg/µl)
collision energy: The collision energy was set from 20 to 45 eV
fractionation method: the application of affinity enrichment chromatography prior to comprehensive LC-MS was adequate to identify several low abundant host cell proteins at the final drug substance level
fragmentation method: Sequencing was performed by low-energy collision-induced dissociation (CID)
instrument: the analysis was performed with a highly sensitive LTQ Orbitrap Velos electrospray mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: 10 µl of 0.1 g/mL dithiothreitol was added
reduction concentration: 10 µl of 0.1 g/mL dithiothreitol was added
